---
title: Extra Exercises
---

## Exercise 1: Data Risk Triage

Given three project scenarios, rank data risks and propose immediate controls.

## Exercise 2: DMP Rewrite Sprint

Take a weak DMP paragraph and rewrite it to include operational detail (storage, access, retention, responsibility).

## Exercise 3: FAIR Improvement Plan

Select one dataset and draft a 30-day plan to improve findability and reusability.
